lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there.

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: Hello, young one. What brings you to our humble dwelling?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering what this place was?

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: These are the Tunnels of Chaos. They radiate with the energy of chaos magic. At the far end of the tunnel, you will find a portal to the Chaos Altar itself where chaos runes are crafted!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is the tunnel so short?

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: The nature of chaos magic itself is mysterious and hard to understand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: The tunnel is here, and yet it is not here. We also are here, where we should be, yet we are somewhere else. And so, the tunnel goes from one place to another, yet touches neither.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I really don't understand.

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: I told you you wouldn't. The best way to think of it is that the tunnel is like a gateway that allows you to travel from one place in the world to another in a more safe and convenient way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I think I see. So it is like a magical alternate route?

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: Exactly! Well done! And at the end, there is a portal which will transport you to the Chaos Altar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are there only three of you?

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: Our order is a secret one and those of us that remain and survive through the ages choose to hide ourselves away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where are the rest of you now?

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: We have built or found many tunnels such as these. This is not the only one. Rest assured, there are many more of us around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is the Wilderness above us?

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: Yes, I can understand you would expect it to be since the tunnel leads to the Chaos Altar. And yet, the tunnel does not enter the Wilderness, no.

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: Rest assured, you are safe here and should not come to harm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem quite nice for a Zamorakian.

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: History is written by the strong and the influential.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does that mean?

lines.speaker: Dakh'thoulan Aegis
lines.text: It means we cannot always believe what we are told to believe. You would do well to remember that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will! Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your time.
